states.name: Goemon
states.title: Legendary Thief
states.description:
"I am the master thief, bringer of freedom!"
A woman's laughter echoes through the streets of Edo. She is Goemon Ishikawa—the elusive and fearless wanderer who shows up wherever people suffer oppression.

states.name: Goemon
states.title: Legendary Thief
states.description: Goemon's Gang's true target was never money or treasure, only freedom. They helped people oppressed by corrupt authorities, earning a reputation as noble outlaws.

states.name: Goemon
states.title: Legendary Thief
states.description:
Still, Goemon didn't hesitate to call herself a criminal. The reason why could be found in her past, but she never let anyone learn anything about it.
Perhaps the one who needed liberation the most was Goemon herself—a woman bound by the shadows of her past.
